dashboard.heroSubtitle: Real-time GitHub trending analytics — powered by data, driven by stars.

about.intro: GitPulse is an open-source analytics dashboard that tracks GitHub trending repositories in real time. It provides star velocity analysis, language distribution, topic trends, and a proprietary trend scoring algorithm to surface the most interesting projects on GitHub.
about.githubApiDesc: Repository metadata, star counts, fork counts, topics, and language information are fetched directly from the GitHub API.
about.dailySnapshotsDesc: A scheduled sync job captures daily snapshots of all tracked repositories, recording star and fork deltas to compute trend data.
about.databaseDesc: All data is stored in a Cloudflare D1 (SQLite) database, enabling fast serverless queries at the edge.
about.step1Desc: Measure the number of new stars gained in the selected time window (today, weekly, or monthly). Higher velocity indicates rising popularity.
about.step2Desc: Track fork creation rate as a proxy for active development interest and community contribution potential.
about.step3Desc: Factor in open issue counts and recent push activity to gauge active maintenance and community health.
about.step4Desc: Combine all signals into a single trend score using weighted coefficients. Star velocity carries the highest weight (60%), followed by fork activity (25%) and engagement (15%).
about.step5Desc: Sort all repositories by their composite score. Track rank changes between snapshots to surface rising and falling projects.
about.disclaimer1: GitPulse is an independent project and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to GitHub, Inc. All GitHub logos, trademarks, and data are the property of their respective owners.
about.disclaimer2: Trend scores are algorithmic estimates based on publicly available data and should not be considered financial or investment advice. Past star activity does not guarantee future popularity.
about.disclaimer3: Data accuracy depends on the GitHub API and the sync schedule. There may be delays or gaps in historical data. Use this tool as a directional reference, not a definitive ranking.
about.footer: GitPulse — Built with Vue 3, Cloudflare Workers & D1
